title: DocuGen Sign Reminder emails
excerpt:

posts.author: NFCMondayADMIN (Sandra Cancel)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are using the DocuGen Sign app item view tool to create documents and send for signatures.

Currently, the workflow operates normally with creating the document and sending the signature request. However, we are encountering a few issues I could use help troubleshooting.

  1. Recipients who get a signature request almost immediately need to request a new link upon receiving the email. It seldom works when received.
  2. When the remind email is sent [we have it set at 7 days] all recipients get a reminder even if they have already signed it [unless all signers have].
  3. The reminder emails come in multiple repeats. One example sent the user 14 emails for the same request within 10 minutes of each other. And this was the user who already signed it.

The status shows this item is partially signed.

Any suggestions?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Have you opened a support request with the Docugen team?

That would be the best place to get support for a specific app.
